shortDescription: British Council / IDP · Academic module · 8–10 week regular batch · Books included

policyAlert.summary: Verify IELTS exam fee and test dates on ielts.org before quoting. Academic vs General Training must match student goal. Never guarantee a band score.

alert.title: Academic module only
alert.body: University and student visa pathways require IELTS Academic. Confirm module before enrollment — not General Training.

about.label: Description
about.value: Structured IELTS Academic preparation — Listening, Reading, Writing, Speaking — with course books, trainer-led classes, homework, and full mock tests.

about.label: Ideal for
about.value: Students targeting band 6.0–7.5 for study abroad, PR pathways requiring Academic, or university conditional offers.

about.label: Delivery
about.value: Regular pace (not crash). Classroom or hybrid per branch schedule. Books issued at enrollment.

about.label: Exam authority
about.value: British Council / IDP (ielts.org) — FLC prepares; student registers and pays exam fee separately.

about.label: After course
about.value: Exam booking support, score tracking, retake/booster recommendation if needed, handoff to admissions when target met.

eligibility.criterion: Diagnostic or prior score on file
Realistic target band vs current level

redFlagsBanner: If attendance drops or mocks stay far below target, pause exam booking and reset the study plan — do not push unprepared students to test.

redFlags.title: Unrealistic target band
redFlags.description: Jump of 2+ bands in 4 weeks expected.
redFlags.fix: Reset timeline or recommend crash/booster realistically

redFlags.title: Chronic absenteeism
redFlags.fix: Counselor call, batch change, or pause

redFlags.title: Wrong module enrolled
redFlags.fix: Move to correct program before exam

faqs.a: Academic is for university and most study visas. GT is for migration/work — different prep and tests.
Yes for this Regular (with books) program — issue at enrollment and log on file.

faqs.q: Who pays the IELTS exam fee?
faqs.a: Student pays British Council or IDP directly. FLC course fee is separate.
No. We set targets from diagnostic data and track mocks — outcomes depend on student effort and attendance.
Minimum four full mocks under exam conditions; more if below target before booking.
Booster or skill-specific sessions based on weakest band; new enrollment as per fee policy.

compliance: Never guarantee an IELTS band score
Separate coaching fee from exam registration fee
Signed enrollment agreement before batch start
Record diagnostic and mock scores on client file
proTips: Set target band in writing at enrollment
Review mock trends weekly — not just overall average
Confirm Academic module for every study-abroad lead
Book exam only after two mocks within 0.5 of target
postApproval: Update client record for admissions / visa team
Celebrate success or plan retake with gap analysis

timeline.title: Classes, homework, skill drills, speaking mocks
Full mock tests & exam readiness review
Exam booking, test day prep, score follow-up

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial IELTS Academic Regular coaching specimen.

staffNotes.author: Coaching team
staffNotes.text: Do not move GT inquiries into Academic Regular — offer GT program or refer.

resources.title: IELTS test reference (FLC specimen)
resources.description: Full test guide — acceptance matrix, test day, module samples

dos: Keep exam fee separate on invoice
donts: Mix GT and Academic in same batch narrative
mistakes: Visa team not updated when target met

sampleDocs.title: Sample 4-week study plan (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Skill rotation for Academic Writing Task 2.

quiz.question: IELTS Academic is required for:
quiz.explanation: Universities and most study pathways need Academic.

quiz.question: IELTS exam fee is paid to:
quiz.explanation: Exam fee is separate from coaching fee.
